creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Created attachment 209746
Patch to x11-wm/piewm/Makefile to make piewm fetchable

Since I use the port, I have an interest in making it available.  (I am also the maintainer.)

I had subscribed to piewm@crynwr.com on 18 Jan 2013, but there was no traffic, and email (back then) had no response.

Anyway, I have verified that both sources work, and have attached a Makefile patch accordingly.
